mapper.sql: id, employee_id, date, check_in_time, check_out_time, status, is_late, late_minutes, is_early_leave, early_leave_minutes, anomaly_type, is_corrected, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance_records SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, date = #{date}, check_in_time = #{checkInTime}, check_out_time = #{checkOutTime}, status = #{status}, is_late = #{isLate}, late_minutes = #{lateMinutes}, is_early_leave = #{isEarlyLeave}, early_leave_minutes = #{earlyLeaveMinutes}, anomaly_type = #{anomalyType}, is_corrected = #{isCorrected}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
